videoSnippet.title: Pressure | Precision | Punishment || Alireza vs Bogdan-Daniel || Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Deac, Bogdan-Daniel (2613) - Firouzja, Alireza (2732)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026 (Chess.com) [02] 2026.07.01
E43 Nimzo-Indian, Fischer variation

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 Bb4 4.e3 b6 5.Bd3 Bb7 6.Nf3 Bxc3+ 7.bxc3 O-O 8.O-O c5 9.Nd2 Nc6 10.Nb3 d6 11.e4 Rc8 12.f3 Ba6 13.Be2 Ne7 14.d5 Ng6 15.Be3 Re8 16.Re1 h6 17.Nd2 Qd7 18.a4 Re7 19.a5 b5 20.dxe6 Rxe6 21.cxb5 Bxb5 22.Bxb5 Qxb5 23.c4 Qd7 24.Qa4 Qe7 25.Nf1 Nh5 26.Qc2 Ne5 27.Rab1 Qd8 28.a6 Rc6 29.Ra1 Qc8 30.Qe2 Rf6 31.Ra2 Rxa6 32.Rea1 Rxa2 33.Qxa2 Qe6 34.Nd2 Rg6 35.Kh1 Kh7 36.Rb1 Nd3 37.Nf1 Nb4 38.Qb3 Qf6 39.Rd1 a5 40.Qa3 Qe6 41.Rc1 f5 42.exf5 Qxf5 43.Qxa5 Qd3 44.Qa8 Qe2 45.f4 d5 46.g3 Ra6 47.Qc8 Ra2 48.Qf5+ g6 49.Qh3 d4 50.Bd2 Nd3 51.Qd7+ Ng7 52.Rb1 Qe4+ 53.Kg1 Nxf4

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:50 Game Starts!
01:45 Completely New Game
05:00 Pause the Video!
11:50 IWITP 
12:50 Standings After DAY 1
13:20 Legends of the Channel
13:40 BIG LOTUS CHESS UPDATE!
